page.title: Hirosaki Castle Chrysanthemum and Autumn Leaves Festival

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:弘前城菊と紅葉まつり]]
The '''Hirosaki Castle Chrysanthemum and Autumn Leaves Festival''' (弘前城菊と紅葉まつり) is one of the {{ill|Hirosaki's Four Major Festivals|ja|弘前四大まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki's Four Major Festivals|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135578990|1=Hirosaki's Four Major Festivals}}, alongside the {{ill|Hirosaki Cherry Blossom Festival|ja|弘前さくらまつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Cherry Blossom Festival|1=Hirosaki Cherry Blossom Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11487199}}, {{ill|Hirosaki Neputa Matsuri|lt=Hirosaki Neputa Matsuri|lt=Hirosaki Neputa Festival|ja|弘前ねぷた|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Neputa Festival|qq=}}, and the {{ill|Hirosaki Castle Snow Lantern Festival|ja|弘前城雪燈籠まつり|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Castle Snow Lantern Festival|1=Hirosaki Castle Snow Lantern Festival|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11487218}}.
It is held at the {{ill|Hirosaki Castle Botanical Garden|ja|弘前城植物園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Castle Botanical Garden|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135578992|1=Hirosaki Castle Botanical Garden}} within {{ill|Hirosaki Park|ja|弘前公園|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hirosaki Park|qq=}}, owned and managed by {{ill|Hirosaki|en|Hirosaki|qid=Q194087|lt=Hirosaki City|1=Hirosaki}}. The garden is decorated with chrysanthemums and around 1,000 maple trees.
[[File:Hirosaki Castle chrysanthemum and autumn leaves festival 03.jpg|thumb|Chrysanthemum Boat and Sightseeing Ship]]
== Overview == Held annually from mid-October to early November, the festival features collaborations of {{ill|Neputa paintings|ja|ねぷた絵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Neputa paintings|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and chrysanthemum dolls, as well as displays like "Chrysanthemum Mount Iwaki" and a "Chrysanthemum Five-Story Pagoda" within the botanical garden. Other attractions include animal-shaped chrysanthemum {{ill|Topiary|en|Topiary|qid=Q1437791|lt=topiary|1=Topiary}}, a citizen's chrysanthemum exhibition, stage events, and mini {{ill|Steam locomotive|en|Steam locomotive|qid=Q171043|lt=steam locomotive|1=Steam locomotive}} rides. Previously, the festival was known as '''Hirosaki Castle Maple and Chrysanthemum Dolls'''.
'''Special Autumn Leaves Illumination''': From sunset until 21:00.
<gallery widths="180" heights="120"> Hirosaki Castle chrysanthemum and autumn leaves festival 02.jpg|Citizen's Chrysanthemum Exhibition </gallery>
== History == * '''1962''' (Showa 37) - The festival originated from "Kanfūkai," an event where chrysanthemums were brought together for exhibitions, evolving into the first official festival under the name "Chrysanthemum and Autumn Leaves Festival." * '''1988''' (Showa 63) - The main venue (paid area) was relocated from Shinomaru to the Hirosaki Castle Botanical Garden. * '''2002''' (Heisei 14) - The festival’s name was changed from "Hirosaki Castle Maple and Chrysanthemum Dolls" to "Hirosaki Castle Chrysanthemum and Autumn Leaves Festival." * '''2020''' (Reiwa 2) - The event was canceled due to the spread of {{ill|SARS-CoV-2|en|SARS-CoV-2|qid=Q82069695|lt=COVID-19|1=SARS-CoV-2}}.
== External Links == * [https://www.hirosaki-kanko.or.jp/web/edit.html?id=cat02_autumn_momiji Hirosaki Castle Chrysanthemum and Autumn Leaves Festival] - (Public Interest Incorporated Association) Hirosaki Tourism and Convention Bureau
{{translated page|ja|弘前城菊と紅葉まつり|version=102470671|comment=Imported full ja history}}
